debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ n, 0 < n ∧ n.primeFactors.card = 2000 ∧ n ∣ 2 ^ n + 1 ↔ Imo2000P5.solution = true

failed_attempts:
rw [Bool.coe_sort_true, iff_true]
  let P (k : ℕ) := ∃ n, 0 < n ∧ n.primeFactors.card = k ∧ n ∣ 2 ^ n + 1
  suffices ∀ k, P (k + 1) by exact this 1999
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero =>
    use 9
    simp only [Nat.primeFactors_mul, Nat.primeFactors_pow, Nat.prime_three,
      List.card_singleton, Nat.succ_pos', true_and, Finset.card_singleton]
    norm_num
  | succ k ih =>
    obtain ⟨n, hn, hcard, hdvd⟩ := ih
    -- By Zsigmondy's theorem for 2^(2n)-1, since n >= 9 > 3,
    -- there exists a primitive prime factor p of 2^(2n)-1.
    -- This p divides 2^n+1 and does not divide n.
    have exists_p : ∃ p, p.Prime ∧ p ∣ 2 ^ n + 1 ∧ ¬p ∣ n := sorry
    obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, hpndvd⟩ := exists_p
    use n * p
    constructor
    · exact Nat.mul_pos hn hp.pos
    constructor
    · rw [Nat.primeFactors_mul hp.ne_zero hn, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint]
      · rw [hcard]; rfl
      · simp only [Finset.disjoint_singleton_right, Nat.mem_primeFactors, hpndvd,
          not_false_iff, and_true]
    · have h_odd_n : n % 2 = 1 := Nat.odd_iff.mp (Nat.odd_of_dvd_add_one hdvd)
      have h_odd_p : p % 2 = 1 := Nat.prime_gt_two_iff.mp (Nat.Prime.gt_two hp (Nat.odd_of_dvd_add_one hpdvd))
      have cop : n.Coprime p := (Nat.Prime.coprime_iff_not_dvd hp).mpr hpndvd
      apply Nat.dvd_of_mode_eq_zero
      rw [Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_dvd_iff_of_coprime cop.symm]
      constructor
      · -- p | 2^(np) + 1
        rw [Nat.pow_mul, Nat.add_mod_eq_zero_iff_mod_eq_sub, Nat.sub_zero]
        have : 2 ^ n % p = p - 1 := Nat.mode_eq_sub_of_dvd hpdvd
        rw [this, Nat.pow_odd_mod_eq_sub _ h_odd_p]
      · -- n | 2^(np) + 1
        rw [Nat.pow_mul', Nat.add_mod_eq_zero_iff_mod_eq_sub, Nat.sub_zero]
        have : 2 ^ n % n = n - 1 := Nat.mode_eq_sub_of_dvd hdvd
        rw [this, Nat.pow_odd_mod_eq_sub _ (Nat.odd_iff.mpr h_odd_p)]
